configuration.title: Oai2Ollama
configuration.apiKey.description: API key for authentication (can also use OPENAI_API_KEY env var)
configuration.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible API (can also use OPENAI_BASE_URL env var)
configuration.capabilities.description: Extra capabilities to mark the model as supporting (completion is always included automatically)
configuration.models.description: Extra models to include in the /api/tags response
configuration.autostart.descripton: Automatically start oai2ollama service when VSCode starts
configuration.host.description: IP / hostname for the API server
